title: Funding
doc_html:
§187.5. Funding

            The state action plan established pursuant to this Subpart shall be implemented upon the appropriation of funds for this purpose.

            Acts 2022, No. 541, §1, eff. June 17, 2022.
doc_text:
§187.5.  Funding
The state action plan established pursuant to this Subpart shall be implemented upon
the appropriation of funds for this purpose.
Acts 2022, No. 541, §1, eff. June 17, 2022.
